issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for operations.
The skill specifies compatibility only for macOS and Linux, lacking Windows support.

scenarios.name: create-keyspace-table-insert-query
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets every rubric requirement, while Response A omits the durable_writes=true clause in the keyspace definition.

scenarios.name: nodejs-driver-insert-query-stream
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets all rubric requirements, while Response B omits the required consistency setting and uses manual pagination instead of client.stream.
